Focus on new/changed hand-written source files in this diff

PRIOR ISSUE RESOLVED: RuleRegistry::validate_all non-deterministic ordering — rules moved from HashMap to BTreeMap in mod.rs line 87; validate_all now deterministic

PRIOR ISSUE RESOLVED: cbpr.rs check_name_required() behavioral bug (silent pass on missing closing tag) — now delegates to common::check_name_in_parent which reports unclosed element error via extract_parent_block
PRIOR ISSUE RESOLVED: cbpr.rs line 468 redundant has_element + extract_element — check_name_required() now delegates entirely to common::check_name_in_parent, no double-check

PRIOR ISSUE STILL OPEN: camt053_to_mt940.rs — DateAndDateTime2Choice match duplicated in extract_balance_date() (lines 196-201) and entry_to_mt61() inline closure (lines 219-224); same 5-line logic, no shared helper extracted

NEW DESIGN ISSUE: sepa.rs validate_pacs008_typed() amount range (lines 436-474) is a near-verbatim copy of the XML-path amount logic (sepa.rs lines 188-228) — both blocks compute decimals, call parse_amount_cents_lenient, check < 1 and > 99_999_999_999; a shared fn validate_sepa_amount_cents() accepting (amt_str, path, errors) would eliminate ~35 lines

NEW DESIGN ISSUE: fednow.rs validate_pacs008_typed() amount validation is properly extracted to self.validate_amount() method (line 282) shared by both XML and typed paths — this is the correct pattern; SEPA should follow suit
CONFIRMED: emit_variable_length() IIFE in pattern_codegen.rs still not reviewed in this pass (not in diff for this iteration)
CONFIRMED: common.rs extract_parent_block() now correctly reports 'unclosed element' error when closing tag is absent — resolves the cbpr behavioral bug
DESIGN NOTE: validate.rs (CLI) MAX_FILE_SIZE doc comment (line 115) appears AFTER the constant it documents (the fn doc above it, the const is on line 116) — minor rustdoc ordering issue
DESIGN NOTE: translate.rs creation_time defaults to '2000-01-01T00:00:00' at line 145 — the silent default is a footgun for callers that omit it for MT->MX conversions

iteration.summary: Fourth full-pass code quality review covering all new hand-written files in commits 355124b..e8b15ec. Two major prior issues are now resolved: mod97 is extracted to a single checkdigit.rs (imported by both iban.rs and lei.rs), and RuleRegistry now uses BTreeMap giving deterministic validate_all ordering. The cbpr.rs behavioral bug (silent pass on unclosed element) is fully resolved via common.rs extract_parent_block() which reports an 'unclosed element' error. The new codegen files (newtypes.rs, validate.rs emit module) are well-structured with proper separation of ConstraintCheckParts, correct TryFrom/new()/From emission, and strong test coverage. The main new finding is that sepa.rs validate_pacs008_typed() duplicates the ~35-line amount validation block from the XML path; fednow.rs correctly solves this with a shared validate_amount() method. Two prior DRY issues remain open (camt053_to_mt940 date extraction, sepa.rs name charset blocks). The translate.rs silent default for creation_time is a latent footgun worth documenting.
outputs_produced: Full code review report (in assistant response)
Updated context file superseding prior review

Extract sepa.rs charset check on names into a closure or private fn check_sepa_name_charset(nm: Option<&Max140Text>, path, errors)
Extract make_fi() into a shared test helper module in roundtrip_all.rs
Add doc comment to translate.rs line 145 noting the '2000-01-01T00:00:00' default is a stub that callers should override for production MT->MX conversions
Move validate.rs MAX_FILE_SIZE doc comment (line 115) to immediately above the constant rather than inside the fn docstring block
